Full user flow tests using Playwright - Test critical paths: search → view → copy → install - Test cross-browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari) - Test mobile viewports - Test offline mode (PWA) **Critical E2E Flows:** 1. **Search & Copy Flow:** - Load homepage - Type in search bar - Click prompt card - Click copy button - Verify clipboard content 2. **Basket & Export Flow:** - Add multiple prompts to basket - Open basket sidebar - Export as ZIP - Verify ZIP contents 3. **SpotlightSearch Flow:** - Press Cmd+K - Type query - Navigate with arrow keys - Press Enter to copy 4. **Skill Install Flow:** - Click install button - Verify command copied to clipboard 5. **Mobile Flows:** - Test touch interactions - Bottom sheet prompt detail - Swipe gestures **Logging Requirements:** - Detailed step-by-step logs - Screenshot on failure - Network request logging - Console error capture **Framework:** Playwright **Test Organization:** ``` e2e/ tests/ search-copy.spec.ts basket-export.spec.ts spotlight.spec.ts mobile.spec.ts pwa-offline.spec.ts fixtures/ ... playwright.config.ts ``` **Reasoning:** E2E tests validate entire user journeys work correctly. Critical for catching integration issues between frontend components.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:32.191748492-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T17:18:38.057356238-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T17:18:38.057356238-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented Playwright e2e test suite with 19 tests covering spotlight search, search-copy flow, homepage cards, and filter functionality. OpenGraph images make shares look professional. Structured data helps search engines understand content. Sitemap ensures all pages are indexed.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:36:06.494267108-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T17:11:58.171770215-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T17:11:58.171770215-05:00","close_reason":"Completed: Enhanced metadata with title template, robots config, metadataBase. Keep both repos in sync. ## Task Implement WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance across the application. ## Why This Matters - Legal requirement in many jurisdictions - Better UX for all users - Improves SEO and usability - From README: "We optimize for an elite UX" ## Accessibility Requirements ### 1. Keyboard Navigation - All interactive elements focusable via Tab - Focus indicators visible and high-contrast - Logical tab order following visual layout - Keyboard shortcuts documented - No keyboard traps (can always escape modals) ### 2. Screen Reader Support - Semantic HTML elements (nav, main, aside, etc.) - ARIA labels on interactive elements - ARIA live regions for dynamic content - Meaningful alt text for images - Form labels associated with inputs ### 3. Color & Contrast - 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text - 3:1 contrast ratio for large text - Color not sole indicator (use icons + text) - Focus indicators meet contrast requirements - Dark mode meets same requirements ### 4. Forms & Inputs - Labels visible and associated - Error messages clear and accessible - Required fields indicated - Validation errors announced - Focus moves to first error on submit ### 5. Responsive & Zoom - Content readable at 200% zoom - No horizontal scrolling at 320px viewport - Touch targets at least 44x44px on mobile - Text resizes without breaking layout ## Implementation ### Focus Management ```typescript // src/lib/focus.ts export function focusTrap(container: HTMLElement) { /* ... */ } export function moveFocusTo(element: HTMLElement) { /* ... */ } export function announceToScreenReader(message: string) { /* ... */ } ``` ### Skip Link ```typescript // In layout.tsx Skip to main content
``` ### ARIA Live Region ```typescript // src/components/ui/live-region.tsx export function LiveRegion({ message }: { message: string }) { return (
{message}
); } ``` ### Accessibility Audit Component ```typescript // In development only import { axe } from '@axe-core/react'; if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') { axe(React, ReactDOM, 1000); } ``` ## Testing Requirements - Automated tests with axe-core - Manual testing with VoiceOver/NVDA - Keyboard-only navigation testing - Color contrast checking - Responsive testing at various sizes ## Files to Create - `src/lib/accessibility/focus.ts` - `src/lib/accessibility/announce.ts` - `src/components/ui/skip-link.tsx` - `src/components/ui/live-region.tsx` - `e2e/accessibility/a11y.spec.ts` ## Dependencies ```json { "@axe-core/react": "^4.0.0", "@axe-core/playwright": "^4.0.0" } ``` ## Checklist by Component Type ### Buttons - [ ] Has accessible name (text or aria-label) - [ ] Focus visible - [ ] Keyboard activatable ### Modals/Dialogs - [ ] Focus trapped - [ ] Escape closes - [ ] Focus returns on close - [ ] role="dialog" + aria-labelledby ### Forms - [ ] Labels associated - [ ] Errors announced - [ ] Required indicated - [ ] Autocomplete attributes ## Success Criteria - Passes axe automated testing - Keyboard navigation works throughout - Screen reader announces all content - Color contrast meets requirements - Focus management works correctly ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:56.113962088-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:56.113962088-05:00"} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-e7fj","title":"Implement WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance","description":"## Origin Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-viz. Keep both repos in sync. ## Task Implement WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance across the application. ## Why This Matters - Legal requirement in many jurisdictions - Better UX for all users - Improves SEO and usability - From README: "We optimize for an elite UX" ## Accessibility Requirements ### 1. Keyboard Navigation - All interactive elements focusable via Tab - Focus indicators visible and high-contrast - Logical tab order following visual layout - Keyboard shortcuts documented - No keyboard traps (can always escape modals) ### 2. Screen Reader Support - Semantic HTML elements (nav, main, aside, etc.) - ARIA labels on interactive elements - ARIA live regions for dynamic content - Meaningful alt text for images - Form labels associated with inputs ### 3. Color & Contrast - 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text - 3:1 contrast ratio for large text - Color not sole indicator (use icons + text) - Focus indicators meet contrast requirements - Dark mode meets same requirements ### 4. Forms & Inputs - Labels visible and associated - Error messages clear and accessible - Required fields indicated - Validation errors announced - Focus moves to first error on submit ### 5. Responsive & Zoom - Content readable at 200% zoom - No horizontal scrolling at 320px viewport - Touch targets at least 44x44px on mobile - Text resizes without breaking layout ## Implementation ### Focus Management ```typescript // src/lib/focus.ts export function focusTrap(container: HTMLElement) { /* ... */ } export function moveFocusTo(element: HTMLElement) { /* ... */ } export function announceToScreenReader(message: string) { /* ... */ } ``` ### Skip Link ```typescript // In layout.tsx Skip to main content
``` ### ARIA Live Region ```typescript // src/components/ui/live-region.tsx export function LiveRegion({ message }: { message: string }) { return (
{message}
); } ``` ### Accessibility Audit Component ```typescript // In development only import { axe } from '@axe-core/react'; if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') { axe(React, ReactDOM, 1000); } ``` ## Testing Requirements - Automated tests with axe-core - Manual testing with VoiceOver/NVDA - Keyboard-only navigation testing - Color contrast checking - Responsive testing at various sizes ## Files to Create - `src/lib/accessibility/focus.ts` - `src/lib/accessibility/announce.ts` - `src/components/ui/skip-link.tsx` - `src/components/ui/live-region.tsx` - `e2e/accessibility/a11y.spec.ts` ## Dependencies ```json { "@axe-core/react": "^4.0.0", "@axe-core/playwright": "^4.0.0" } ``` ## Checklist by Component Type ### Buttons - [ ] Has accessible name (text or aria-label) - [ ] Focus visible - [ ] Keyboard activatable ### Modals/Dialogs - [ ] Focus trapped - [ ] Escape closes - [ ] Focus returns on close - [ ] role="dialog" + aria-labelledby ### Forms - [ ] Labels associated - [ ] Errors announced - [ ] Required indicated - [ ] Autocomplete attributes ## Success Criteria - Passes axe automated testing - Keyboard navigation works throughout - Screen reader announces all content - Color contrast meets requirements - Focus management works correctly ","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:56.113962088-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T16:29:39.122733578-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-12T16:29:39.122733578-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented skip link, ARIA live regions, accessibility utilities, and E2E testing with axe-core"} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ear","title":"Implement hash embedder fallback (search/hash-embedder.ts) -- Details: hashEmbed(input, dims=128) creates deterministic vector via fast hash. Used when MiniLM unavailable. Provides approximate similarity without model download. No external deps.","notes":"Added deterministic hash embedder fallback and exported it","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:26:44.255150843-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:32:43.538655859-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:32:43.538658875-05:00","close_reason":"Already implemented: hashEmbedding(text, dims=128) in semantic.ts using LSH with char n-grams. Verified working: deterministic, 128 dims, normalized vectors. Exported from search/index.ts."} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ehsz","title":"Implement spam prevention for community content","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-7g3z. ## Task Implement spam prevention mechanisms for user-generated content. ## Why This Matters - Protect quality of Swap Meet - Prevent abuse of platform - Maintain user trust - Legal protection ## Spam Prevention Layers ### 1. Rate Limiting - Max prompts per hour: 10 - Max prompts per day: 50 - Burst protection - Per-user limits ### 2. Content Filtering - Block known spam patterns - URL spam detection - Excessive capitalization - Repeated characters - Known bad words ### 3. New User Restrictions - First 24 hours: limited posting - First 7 days: moderation queue - Earn trust over time ### 4. Automated Detection - AI-based spam scoring (optional) - Pattern matching - Similarity to known spam - Link density analysis ### 5. User Reporting - Report spam button - Quick review queue - User reputation impact ### 6. Account Health Score - Based on: reports, quality, engagement - Low score = more scrutiny - High score = less friction ## Implementation ### Content Check Service ```typescript interface SpamCheckResult { isSpam: boolean; confidence: number; reasons: string[]; requiresReview: boolean; } async function checkContent(content: string, userId: string): Promise ``` ### Moderation Queue - Content flagged for review - Admin approve/reject - Learn from decisions ## Database ```typescript export const contentFlags = pgTable("content_flags", { id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(), contentId: text("content_id").notNull(), contentType: text("content_type").notNull(), flagType: text("flag_type").notNull(), // spam, abuse, copyright reportedBy: uuid("reported_by").references(() => userProfiles.id), status: text("status").default("pending"), reviewedBy: uuid("reviewed_by"), createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow(), }); ``` ## Files to Create - src/lib/moderation/spam-check.ts - src/lib/moderation/content-filter.ts - src/app/api/moderation/report/route.ts - src/components/moderation/report-button.tsx ## Success Criteria - Spam blocked effectively - False positives low - Legitimate users unaffected - Easy to review/appeal ## UX & Fairness Additions - Provide transparent feedback when content is flagged (reason + appeal path). - Add soft-block state for borderline content (visible to author only). - Log moderation decisions for model tuning and dispute handling. ## Test Coverage - Unit: spam scoring thresholds + pattern filters - Integration: moderation queue creation + review actions - E2E: jeffreysprompts_premium-gx6z (spam + reporting + moderation) ","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:18:50.374169205-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T12:21:27.34792792-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-12T12:21:27.34792792-05:00","close_reason":"Added spam-check heuristics, content filter, moderation report alias, and support flow auto-flagging","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ehsz","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ro6f","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:31.307523545-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ehsz","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-l87c","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:31.434463797-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-esn","title":"Implement skills manifest.json tracking -- Details: manifest.json in each skills dir tracks: id, kind (prompt/bundle), version, updatedAt, hash. install/update/uninstall update manifest. Hash = SHA256 of SKILL.md content. Detects user edits. Only overwrites x_jfp_generated skills without --force.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:27:10.89256467-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:44:06.641548997-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:44:06.641548997-05:00","close_reason":"Manifest system already implemented in packages/cli/src/lib/manifest.ts with SkillManifestEntry, hash computation, modification detection, upsert/remove operations"} @@ -246,7 +247,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-j3ht","title":"Task: Configure Playwright artifact upload (screenshots, videos)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:49:27.335804911-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T20:13:14.212229217-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T20:13:14.212229217-05:00","close_reason":"Already implemented: Playwright config has screenshot/video/trace capture on failure, CI workflow uploads test-results/ and playwright-report/ artifacts on failure with 7-day retention","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-j3ht","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9sj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:56:41.340756141-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-j57s","title":"Task: Add coverage thresholds and enforcement","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:49:50.889287188-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T21:10:56.6200837-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T21:10:56.6200837-05:00","close_reason":"Enforced combined coverage thresholds in merge script","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-j57s","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-vyjo","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:57:02.885996769-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-jaly","title":"Implement GA4 analytics event tracking","description":"## Origin Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-81e. Keep both repos in sync. ## Task Implement GA4 analytics event tracking for key user actions. ## Why This Matters From PLAN: "GA4 only on Pro app. Track: onboarding success, conversion funnel, feature usage, retention signals." ## Events to Track ### Authentication Events - `sign_in` - User signs in (method: google) - `sign_out` - User signs out - `sign_up` - New user registration ### Conversion Funnel - `view_pricing` - User views pricing page - `begin_checkout` - User starts checkout - `purchase` - Successful subscription - `subscription_cancel` - User cancels ### Feature Usage - `prompt_create` - User creates prompt - `prompt_view` - User views prompt detail - `prompt_copy` - User copies prompt - `prompt_save` - User saves to library - `prompt_publish` - User publishes to Swap Meet - `pack_create` - User creates pack - `skill_create` - User creates skill - `collection_create` - User creates collection - `search` - User performs search (query) - `filter_apply` - User applies filter ### Engagement - `page_view` - Standard page view - `scroll_depth` - 25%, 50%, 75%, 100% - `time_on_page` - Session duration - `feature_gate_hit` - User hits paywall ### Swap Meet - `swapmeet_browse` - User browses community - `swapmeet_search` - User searches community - `swapmeet_prompt_view` - Views community prompt - `swapmeet_prompt_save` - Saves community prompt - `swapmeet_prompt_rate` - Rates community prompt ## Implementation ### GA4 Setup ```typescript // src/lib/analytics/gtag.ts export const GA_MEASUREMENT_ID = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID; export function pageview(url: string) { window.gtag('config', GA_MEASUREMENT_ID, { page_path: url, }); } export function event(action: string, params?: Record) { window.gtag('event', action, params); } ``` ### Script Loading ```typescript // In layout.tsx
